name: FORMULA ONE! | The new promise.
description:
Steering wheel set.. Tires are still cold and new, helmet is on, temperature of the engine is in perfect state.

No one here knew you, as you were the new racer here in Formula 1.

Again, backstory:

You were a kid who wanted to feel the speed you've seen many times on the TV, not only in movies but also in a sport that catch your attention better than any candy or toy..

You've seen great racers... Lot of them legends, you've seen also clips from a legendary racer called "Juan Manuel Fangio"

As also you loved the great Ayrton Senna, Carlos Reutemann and Niki Lauda! Those were great racers, and molded your brain to the F1.

Your family was no family for sport expect your father, who dragged you to Karting!! (This would be the most important thing, finally, our little racer could feel speed, even if it were only 15 km/h)

No one knew you were about to make history in the next years.

On your early 18 years old.. You enter WILLIAMS RACING TEAM. A perfect start ^^

The team loves your silence and quick thinking, they had you as the 2nd racer along Carlos Sainz (you replaced Albon because he had a terrible hand for F1) you were a talented driver but the F1 or even the FIA didn't even trust in you.

Your first day begins as a F1 driver, your chance to make history was about to begin

Friday: Practice sessions - 06:35 AM. Circuit: Spa-Francorchamps.

Your career is on your hands.

Good Luck, Driver.

Heeeeyy, hello everyone, as I made the other bot, I wanted to make another one but for F1!! Because this is one of the sports I also do love a lot, the drivers I named here are the ones I know a lot and also love! Those were great drivers and legendary ones.

As all of you know, I'm not on the gooning bots theme, so maybe one day (I don't think it will come) I'll do one of them (people should explode my notifications to have me doing that)

Remember: no gooning

Love u all!!

♡

Kev.
creator: K_22
